ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the show (e.g., Movie, Series) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the show */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the show */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the show was added to the platform */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the show was released */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the show (e.g., R, PG) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the show */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the show */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the show */,
  "subtitle_languages" TEXT /* Languages in which subtitles are available */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Company that produced the show */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB identifier for cross-referencing */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the trailer of the show */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the show */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating (e.g., TV-MA, TV-14) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchy) */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_genres" (
  "show_id" TEXT /* ID of the show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre assigned to the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast entry */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* ID of the show in which the actor appears */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., lead, supporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Unique username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content manager, viewer) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* ID of the show being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the show */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the show was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the show was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the show (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the show was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* ID of the show being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user maintaining the watchlist */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* ID of the show added to the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the show was added to the watchlist */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the show in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "show_id" TEXT /* ID of the show for which feedback was provided */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made by the user regarding the show */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)
